title: ilex robusta
intro: Ilex robusta, also known as the Chinese holly or Manchurian holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The leaves and berries of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex robusta include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its effects.
